title: Phase 1.3: CameraX Capture & Android MediaStore Storage
description:
Implement image capture using CameraX's ImageCapture and save the resulting file directly to the device's public photo gallery using the Android native MediaStore API.

Please read docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md) and docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md) for requirements and technical details.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Pressing the capture button takes a photo and saves it to the Android photo library.
- The final file path/URI is returned to Flutter and triggers the captured path toast/notification overlay.
- Image files are viewable in the system's gallery app.
notes:
UI Location: Tombol shutter besar di tengah bawah CameraScreen.

Panduan Testing Manual:
1. Jalankan aplikasi di device Android fisik atau emulator.
2. Ketuk tombol shutter lingkaran besar di tengah bawah pada CameraScreen untuk memicu pengambilan foto. Pastikan overlay animasi film berkembang (developing film) muncul.
3. Setelah capture sukses, verifikasi bahwa path file atau URI MediaStore yang dikembalikan dari native ditampilkan pada layar sebagai toast/overlay.
4. Buka aplikasi Google Photos atau File Manager di perangkat Android. Buka direktori Pictures/Rana, pastikan folder tersebut ada dan foto yang baru diambil tersimpan di sana dalam resolusi penuh.
5. Lakukan pengambilan foto menggunakan kamera depan, lalu buka Google Photos dan verifikasi foto tersebut disimpan dalam keadaan ter-mirror horizontal agar berorientasi sama seperti yang terlihat pada preview kamera.

title: Phase 1.1: Android CameraX Preview Integration (PlatformView)
description:
Initialize CameraX in the Android native project and render the camera feed inside a Flutter AndroidView.

Please read docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md) and docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md) for requirements and technical details.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Live camera preview displays correctly inside the viewfinder on the CameraScreen.
- Preview fills the aspect ratio container without stretching.
notes:
UI Location:
- Elemen preview kamera live yang baru diintegrasikan muncul di dalam area Viewfinder (jendela bidik/kotak tengah berukuran aspect ratio 3:4) pada halaman utama CameraScreen.

Perubahan Tambahan (Fix Alignment):
- Mengatur LayoutParams dari native PreviewView ke MATCH_PARENT agar mengisi penuh container PlatformView.
- Mengatur implementationMode dari PreviewView ke COMPATIBLE (menggunakan TextureView) agar kompatibel penuh dengan sistem compositing, clipping (ClipRRect), dan scaling dari Flutter.

Panduan Testing Manual:
1. Jalankan aplikasi di emulator atau device Android fisik dengan perintah 'flutter run'.
2. Pastikan permission Kamera dan Storage sudah diberikan (atau klik 'GRANT ACCESS' saat diminta).
3. Verifikasi bahwa area viewfinder di tengah layar yang sebelumnya berupa mock background tulisan abu-abu kini menampilkan umpan preview video langsung (live camera preview feed) dari kamera belakang default.
4. Pastikan preview video terisi penuh secara proporsional dan ter-center (FILL_CENTER) sesuai dengan batas melengkung (rounded corners) viewfinder tanpa mengalami distorsi, pergeseran (offset ke kiri atas), atau peregangan (stretching).
5. Lakukan pengujian memindahkan device ke berbagai arah untuk memverifikasi kelancaran umpan frame video dari kamera.

title: Phase 0.6: Permission Lifecycle Workflows & System Event Handlers
description:
Build the permission request and validation workflow using permission_handler. Properly request Camera and Storage permissions, handling denied, restricted, and permanently disabled scenarios. Incorporate Flutter WidgetsBindingObserver to manage app lifecycle changes (inactive, paused, resumed) and release camera resources cleanly.

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
Denying permissions shows a clear screen prompting users to open settings.
Backgrounding/resuming the app prints lifecycle events to console and updates state correctly.
notes:
UI Location:
- Saat app pertama kali dibuka (setelah Splash Screen), layar PermissionScreen akan muncul jika permission kamera atau storage belum diberikan.
- Di Android, dialog permission sistem akan dipicu saat tombol 'GRANT ACCESS' ditekan.
- Jika pengguna memilih 'Permanently Denied', tombol 'OPEN APP SETTINGS' akan muncul untuk membuka halaman pengaturan aplikasi di Android.

Panduan Testing Manual:
1. Jalankan aplikasi di emulator atau device Android dengan 'flutter run'.
2. Setelah Splash Screen selesai (~1.2 detik), verifikasi bahwa layar 'PERMISSIONS REQUIRED' berwarna gelap (retro slate) muncul.
3. Tekan tombol 'GRANT ACCESS' dan tolak (deny) permission Kamera atau Storage. Pastikan UI status card memperbarui status secara dinamis ke ikon silang merah (Access Denied).
4. Tekan tombol 'GRANT ACCESS' lagi dan pilih 'Don't ask again' / tolak permanen. Verifikasi tombol berubah menjadi 'OPEN APP SETTINGS' dengan teks pemberitahuan merah.
5. Tekan 'OPEN APP SETTINGS' dan pastikan pengaturan OS untuk aplikasi Rana terbuka.
6. Berikan permission Kamera dan Storage di pengaturan OS, lalu kembali ke aplikasi. Verifikasi aplikasi mendeteksi perubahan permission secara dinamis via lifecycle observer dan langsung masuk ke layar utama kamera (CameraScreen).
7. Di layar utama kamera, background-kan aplikasi (pindah ke home screen OS), lalu periksa log konsol. Pastikan tertulis pesan lifecycle: 'App lifecycle changed to: AppLifecycleState.paused' dan camera resources berhasil di-release.
8. Buka kembali aplikasi Rana (resume), verifikasi log konsol mendeteksi 'AppLifecycleState.resumed' dan kamera di-inisialisasi ulang dengan sukses.

title: Phase 0.5: Android Native Platform Bridge (MethodChannel & EventChannel)
description:
Establish native channel communications between Flutter (Dart) and Android Native (Kotlin).
- Setup a MethodChannel to handle commands (e.g., initialize camera, select shader, execute capture).
- Setup an EventChannel to push status updates from Android back to Flutter (e.g., active status, fps metrics, frame captured events).

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
Flutter executes platform methods and receives data.
Native platform streams mock events (e.g. dummy frame rate numbers) that show up in Dart UI in real-time.
notes:
(1) Lokasi elemen baru/berubah di UI:
- Camera Screen: Indikator status platform (hijau/merah bulat) dan teks frame rate (misalnya "LIVE — 28 FPS") terletak di bagian tengah atas, di antara tombol flash dan tombol flip kamera.

(2) Panduan pengujian manual:
1. Hubungkan perangkat Android fisik atau buka Android Emulator.
2. Jalankan app dengan perintah `flutter run` dari direktori `/Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana`.
3. Setelah app melewati Splash Screen dan masuk ke Camera Screen, verifikasi bahwa indikator status di bar atas berubah menjadi hijau dengan teks "LIVE — XX FPS" yang nilainya berkedip/diperbarui setiap detik (menunjukkan mock event stream dari Kotlin berjalan lancar).
4. Verifikasi juga di terminal debug bahwa tidak ada error/warning terkait kegagalan platform channel.

title: Phase 0.2: Navigation Router Configuration & Stub Screen Shells
description:
Set up the routing configuration using go_router. Create basic shell UI widgets for Splash Screen, Camera (Home) Screen, Gallery Screen, and Settings Screen.

Implement declarative routes:
- /splash (Initial screen, auto-navigates to /camera)
- /camera (Home screen with placeholders for shutter, preset carousel, flash button)
- /gallery (Media viewer placeholder)
- /settings (Preferences configuration placeholder)

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
The app launches into Splash and automatically redirects to Camera.
Basic navigation transitions between Camera, Gallery, and Settings work smoothly.
notes:
Implementasi navigasi Phase 0.2 selesai — siap review manual.

RINGKASAN PERUBAHAN:
1. lib/features/splash/view/splash_screen.dart — SplashScreen baru dengan icon kamera dan wordmark 'Rana', layar hitam, auto-redirect ke /camera setelah 1.2 detik
2. lib/core/widgets/main_shell.dart — Shell baru berisi NavigationBar persisten dengan 3 tab: Camera, Gallery, Settings
3. lib/core/router/app_router.dart — Route / menampilkan SplashScreen (initial location); /camera, /gallery, /settings dibungkus dalam StatefulShellRoute
4. lib/features/camera/view/camera_screen.dart — Tombol navigasi manual dihapus; layout disederhanakan menjadi placeholder shutter
5. test/navigation_test.dart — 4 test navigasi ditambahkan
6. test/widget_test.dart — diperbaiki untuk drain timer splash

flutter analyze: 0 issues
flutter test: 5/5 passed

PANDUAN TESTING MANUAL:
1. Jalankan: flutter run (dari /Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana)
2. Verifikasi Splash: App terbuka ke layar hitam dengan icon kamera dan tulisan 'RANA' di tengah selama ~1.2 detik
3. Auto-redirect: Setelah splash, app otomatis pindah ke Camera Screen — terlihat NavigationBar di bawah dengan 3 ikon (Camera, Gallery, Settings)
4. Tab Camera: Tab Camera aktif (ikon solid), placeholder shutter terlihat di layar
5. Tab Gallery: Tap ikon Gallery → berpindah ke Gallery Screen; tab aktif berubah
6. Tab Settings: Tap ikon Settings → berpindah ke Settings Screen; tab aktif berubah
7. Kembali ke Camera: Tap ikon Camera → kembali ke Camera Screen
8. Hot restart: Splash muncul lagi, lalu kembali ke Camera

title: Phase 0.1: Flutter Project Initialization, Directory Architecture & Lint Config
description:
Initialize the Flutter project in the root directory. Configure analysis options (linting rules), formatting rules, and set up a modular, feature-first directory architecture.

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
Flutter project compiles and runs on Android.
Linting rules (analysis_options.yaml) are strictly defined.
Folder structure is created with dummy readme placeholders.
notes:
Phase 0.1 selesai diimplementasikan dan siap untuk review manual.

RINGKASAN PERUBAHAN:
- Flutter project diinisialisasi dengan org com.rana.app, platform Android only
- Struktur folder modular (feature-first): lib/core/{router,theme,utils,widgets}, lib/features/{camera,gallery,settings}, lib/data/{models,sources}
- analysis_options.yaml dengan strict-casts, strict-inference, strict-raw-types dan lint rules lengkap (kompatibel Dart 3.11)
- go_router: named routes /camera, /gallery, /settings
- Stub screens: CameraScreen, GalleryScreen, SettingsScreen (placeholder Phase 0)
- AppLogger singleton menggunakan package logger
- pubspec.yaml: go_router, flutter_riverpod, riverpod_annotation, logger, permission_handler; asset dirs terdaftar
- WORKTREE.md: panduan git worktree untuk semua issue berikutnya
- flutter analyze: 0 issues; flutter test: 1/1 passed

PANDUAN REVIEW MANUAL:
1. cd /Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana
2. flutter run (pastikan Android device/emulator aktif)
3. Verifikasi app terbuka langsung ke Camera Screen (layar hitam dengan icon kamera dan 3 tombol bawah)
4. Tap ikon gallery (kiri) → pastikan berpindah ke Gallery Screen
5. Tap tombol back → kembali ke Camera Screen
6. Tap ikon settings (kanan) → pastikan berpindah ke Settings Screen
7. Tap tombol back → kembali ke Camera Screen
8. Rotate device → pastikan tidak crash

ELEMENT UI YANG PERLU DIVERIFIKASI:
- Camera Screen: ikon kamera putih di tengah, 3 tombol bawah (gallery, shutter, settings)
- Gallery Screen: AppBar 'Gallery' dengan back button, ikon foto di tengah
- Settings Screen: AppBar 'Settings' dengan back button, ikon settings di tengah

title: Phase 1.4: Lifecycle, Device Orientation, and Verification
description:
Handle lifecycle transitions and screen rotations on the native CameraX side, and implement automated tests.

Please read docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md) and docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md) for requirements and technical details.

Acceptance Criteria:
- No crashes when screen is rotated or app is backgrounded/resumed.
- Rotation logic updates camera orientation to match portrait/landscape capture.
- Static analysis (flutter analyze) and tests (flutter test) pass with zero errors.

title: Phase 1.2: Lens Switching, Flash Controls, & Front Mirroring
description:
Implement front/back lens toggle, flash mode switching, and mirror front camera outputs on the native side.

Please read docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md) and docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md) for requirements and technical details.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Tapping the flip lens button switches camera streams cleanly.
- Tapping the flash button toggles between flash states (off/on/auto) correctly.
- Front camera preview/output shows mirroring correction.
notes:
UI Location: Tombol flip lens dan tombol flash di CameraScreen.

Panduan Testing Manual:
1. Jalankan aplikasi di device Android fisik atau emulator dengan kamera aktif.
2. Ketuk tombol flip lens (tombol ikon kamera berputar) di bagian bawah kanan CameraScreen. Verifikasi bahwa preview kamera berpindah secara lancar antara kamera belakang dan depan.
3. Ketuk tombol flash di bagian atas kiri CameraScreen secara berulang untuk mengganti mode flash (on/off/auto). Pastikan setelan flash berubah dan ter-update di native CameraX secara dinamis tanpa penundaan atau restart session.
4. Beralih ke kamera depan dan verifikasi bahwa preview kamera depan ter-mirror secara horizontal dengan benar.

title: Phase 0.7: Core Logging, Exception Catcher & Global Error Screen
description:
Integrate a logger framework (like logger package) to format debug/error output. Set up a global exception catcher (runZonedGuarded or FlutterError.onError) to direct unhandled crashes away from default OS boundaries into a user-friendly, retro-themed Error Screen.

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
Custom error UI renders on throw exceptions.
Logs are cleanly captured with distinct severity tags (Debug, Warning, Error, Fatal).
notes:
UI Location:
- Jika terjadi crash/unhandled exception (baik synchronous di UI rendering maupun asynchronous di tingkat platform/engine), aplikasi akan mengalihkan seluruh layar ke retro CRT-styled terminal GlobalErrorScreen.

Panduan Testing Manual:
1. Untuk memicu error synchronous saat rendering: buka file 'lib/features/camera/view/camera_screen.dart' dan buat modifikasi sementara yang melempar exception di dalam metode build (misalnya 'throw Exception(\'MOCK SYNCHRONOUS RENDER FAULT\');').
2. Jalankan aplikasi via 'flutter run' dan bypass layar permission (pastikan permission sudah diberikan).
3. Verifikasi bahwa aplikasi langsung menampilkan layar hitam dengan filter scanline amber CRT bertuliskan 'CRITICAL SYSTEM FAULT', detail pesan exception 'MOCK SYNCHRONOUS RENDER FAULT', dan seluruh stack trace log yang dapat di-scroll.
4. Tekan tombol amber neon 'SYSTEM REBOOT / RELOAD' di bagian bawah layar.
5. Verifikasi bahwa state error dibersihkan dan aplikasi mencoba melakukan reboot/reload ulang secara mulus.
6. Hapus throw exception simulasi di 'camera_screen.dart'.
7. Untuk memicu error asynchronous: buat trigger sementara (misalnya di tombol shutter tap) yang menjalankan: 'Future.delayed(Duration.zero, () => throw Exception(\'MOCK ASYNCHRONOUS EXCEPTION\'));'.
8. Tap tombol shutter di aplikasi, verifikasi bahwa PlatformDispatcher berhasil menangkap error asinkron tersebut dan langsung mengalihkan antarmuka aplikasi secara global ke 'GlobalErrorScreen'.

title: Phase 0.4: State Management Integration & Camera State Mock Models
description:
Configure state management (Riverpod or Bloc). Model the core states required for the camera interface, including flash configuration, active lens (front/back), active preset, and capturing animation status. Build a mock service to test switching camera states.

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
Core states are readable and writable using providers/blocs.
Interacting with placeholder buttons (e.g. Flash toggle) correctly updates app state and triggers corresponding UI updates.
notes:
(1) Lokasi elemen baru/berubah di UI:
- Camera Screen:
  - Tombol flash di pojok kiri atas (ikon berubah menyesuaikan mode off/on/auto).
  - Tombol flip kamera di pojok kanan atas.
  - Viewfinder di tengah dengan garis grid 3x3 dan penunjuk stempel tanggal warna oranye di pojok kanan bawah.
  - Carousell filter preset di panel bawah (chip pilihan seperti CLASSIC F1, RETRO W2, dsb.).
  - Tombol shutter besar berbentuk bulat di tengah bawah untuk memotret.
  - Animasi "DEVELOPING FILM..." yang menutup layar viewfinder saat proses capture sedang berlangsung.
  - Efek kilatan putih di layar (flash effect) saat capture sukses dan notifikasi "Captured: <path>" yang muncul sementara di bagian bawah.

(2) Panduan pengujian manual:
1. Jalankan aplikasi menggunakan `flutter run`.
2. Tap tombol Flash (pojok kiri atas) beberapa kali dan verifikasi bahwa ikon bergantian antara flash off, flash on (warna kuning), dan flash auto (warna oranye).
3. Tap tombol Flip Lens (pojok kanan atas) dan verifikasi bahwa mock viewfinder berubah orientasi (misal, Rear Camera Viewfinder -> Front Camera Viewfinder).
4. Pilih chip filter di panel bawah (misalnya CLASSIC F1) dan pastikan chip tersebut terpilih (berwarna oranye).
5. Tap tombol Shutter bulat besar di tengah bawah. Verifikasi:
   - Overlay gelap bertuliskan "DEVELOPING FILM..." muncul selama 800ms.
   - Layar berkedip putih seketika (flash effect).
   - Teks notifikasi hijau bertuliskan "Captured: /mock/path/photo.jpg" muncul di panel bawah.

title: Phase 0.3: Asset Pipeline & Directory Structure Setup
description:
Set up the directories and declare the asset pipeline in pubspec.yaml. We will skip a custom design/theme system for now (using basic default UI/UX) as focus is on developing core app functionality first.

Assets structure to configure:
- assets/presets/ (LUT textures, JSON parameters)
- assets/overlays/ (PNG borders, light leaks, dust layers)
- assets/stamps/ (TTF/OTF fonts for vintage timestamps)
- assets/icons/ (App icons)

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
The assets directories exist under ./assets.
Placeholder assets are registered in pubspec.yaml and load successfully.
notes:
(1) Lokasi elemen baru/berubah di UI:
Tidak ada perubahan elemen UI secara langsung. Ini adalah setup background asset pipeline. Namun, placeholder aset berikut telah terdaftar dan siap digunakan:
- assets/presets/placeholder.json (dari fase sebelumnya)
- assets/overlays/placeholder.png
- assets/stamps/placeholder.ttf
- assets/icons/placeholder.png

(2) Panduan pengujian manual:
1. Jalankan perintah `flutter test` di terminal proyek `/Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana`.
2. Pastikan semua unit test berjalan dengan sukses (12/12 passed).
3. Verifikasi bahwa file-file placeholder berikut ada di direktori aset proyek dan tidak kosong:
   - `assets/overlays/placeholder.png`
   - `assets/stamps/placeholder.ttf`
   - `assets/icons/placeholder.png`
